name: io.github.Kopaev/openvan-travel
description: Free vanlife and RV travel data for AI agents — 11 read-only tools: retail fuel prices across 125+ countries (gasoline, diesel, LPG, CNG), VanSky weather suitability scores (0-100), VanBasket food price index, currency exchange rates for 150+ currencies, vanlife events (expos, festivals, meetups), aggregated news stories in 7 languages. No authentication, 120 req/min rate limit, CC BY 4.0.
